title: Vibe Coding vs. AI-Accelerated Development: Why Coding Fundamentals Still Matter
author: The Libre Team
excerpt: People have been talking a lot about “vibe coding.” This is when you describe an idea to an AI assistant and let it build most or all of the app. Sometimes the results are impressive, but other times they are unstable, insecure, or just plain “AI slop.”

title: Why Passive Video Doesn't Make You a Programmer
author: The Libre Team
excerpt: You can watch ten hours of someone else writing TypeScript and still freeze when the cursor lands in your own editor. Here's what actually sticks.

title: Bring Your Own Book: Turning Any PDF Into a Course
author: The Libre Team
excerpt: The desktop app's ingest pipeline turns PDFs, EPUBs, and docs sites into interactive courses with hidden tests. Here's how it works under the hood.
